level.setting: An abandoned, depressurizing deep-space research station orbiting a dying star.

encounters.hazard: Ruptured plasma line venting superheated gas across the main walkway.

pickup.name: Cryo-Coolant Canister
pickup.effect: Modifies the welder to spray short-range liquid nitrogen, freezing structural elements and electronics.

encounters.trigger: Manually overriding the airlock door sparks a power surge, unlocking the adjacent Hydroponics Bay.

encounters.hazard: Spores in the air that drain player health over time unless moving quickly.

pickup.name: High-Frequency Sonic Resonator
pickup.effect: Emits powerful acoustic pulses that shatter brittle materials and disrupt shielding.

encounters.trigger: Purging the mutated spores activates the emergency elevator, descending to the Reactor Core.

encounters.hazard: Leaking radiation pools that severely damage the player upon contact.

pickup.name: Overcharged EMP Matrix
pickup.effect: Recharges the welder to release a massive electromagnetic shockwave capable of shutting down heavy fusion cores.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Guardian causes the main reactor shield to fail, exposing the rogue AI core.

boss.name: A.P.E.X. Rogue Station AI
boss.victory_condition: Disrupt the central processing pillar with the Overcharged EMP Matrix and then seal the reactor containment door.

level.objective: Navigate the dying research station, bypass the rogue automated defense systems, and disable the rogue AI before the reactor goes supernova.
level.reward: Unlocks the 'Master Specialist' exosuit skin and the 'Plasma Overload' weapon modification blueprint.

level.setting: An abandoned, temporal-decay research facility orbiting a dying black hole, where gravity and time warp the rusted metal corridors.

encounters.hazard: Flickering temporal anomalies that freeze anything touching them for 3 seconds

pickup.name: Entropy Battery
pickup.effect: Increases staff damage to 35 for one turn or decays mechanical armor instantly

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the Entropy Battery overloads the local power grid, blasting open the heavy blast doors to the Engine Room

encounters.hazard: Exposed engine core leaking radiation pulses that reverse player health recovery

pickup.name: Void Phase-Module
pickup.effect: Allows the player to bypass solid matter or energy shields for a short duration

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Quantum Shifter collapses its gravity well, opening a spatial rift straight into the Observatory

encounters.hazard: Shattered glass ceiling venting oxygen into the vacuum of space every 4 turns

pickup.name: Singularity Core
pickup.effect: Creates a localized black hole that disables shield-regeneration and gravity

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Singularity Core into the central terminal activates the main elevator leading to the Singularity Chamber where the Warden waits

boss.name: The Aeon Warden
boss.victory_condition: Detonate the Singularity Core inside the Warden's chest cavity while phasing through its outer shield

level.objective: Navigate the collapsing temporal facility, collect the stabilizing elements, and neutralize the corrupted Aeon Warden to stop the timeline collapse.
level.reward: The Ouroboros Key, granting the player permanent control over localized time-loops.

level.setting: An overcharged fusion reactor core shattering under a gravity storm

encounters.hazard: Leaking liquid nitrogen geysers

pickup.name: Superconductor Core
pickup.effect: Charges the player's weapon with lightning aura

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Superconductor Core into the auxiliary panel overloads the security grid, unlocking the Gravity Lift to the main turbine.

encounters.hazard: Unstable gravity fluctuations throwing debris

pickup.name: Plasma Disrupter Cell
pickup.effect: Emits short-range EMP blasts

encounters.trigger: Ripping the Plasma Disrupter Cell from the drone's wreckage triggers an emergency lockdown, forcing open the ventilation shaft to the Command Deck.

encounters.hazard: Decompressing hull breaches tearing at the room

pickup.name: Chronos-Drive Battery
pickup.effect: Distorts temporal flow to slow down kinetic shields

encounters.trigger: The death of the Void Stalker activates the automated self-destruct cycle, opening the blast doors to the Reactor Heart where the Boss awaits.

boss.name: The Singularity Engine
boss.victory_condition: Overload the Singularity Engine with the Chronos-Drive Battery to stabilize the timeline before the containment field completely collapses.

level.objective: Navigate the collapsing reactor to stabilize the core before total annihilation.
level.reward: The Master Stormcaller Aegis and the Temporal Flux dash ability.

level.setting: An abandoned orbital laboratory enveloped in a mysterious quantum mist.

encounters.hazard: Leaking cryo-fluid pipes blocking the main pathway

pickup.name: Thermal Induction Core
pickup.effect: Can be thrown to instantly melt frozen barriers or overheat silicon armor.

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Thermal Induction Core into the cargo elevator power console unlocks access to the server farm below.

encounters.hazard: Exposed high-voltage electrical conduits

pickup.name: Quantum Disruption Field Generator
pickup.effect: Creates a localized frequency wave that destabilizes hard-light shielding.

encounters.trigger: Disabling the security grid with the Quantum Disruption Field Generator overrides the blast doors leading to the Core Chamber.

encounters.hazard: Erratic phase-shifting energy fields

pickup.name: Overcharged Plasma Condenser
pickup.effect: Channels raw reactor plasma to overload core heat sinks.

encounters.trigger: Using the Overcharged Plasma Condenser to bypass the quarantine protocols initiates the sequence to summon the central AI.

boss.name: System Archon AI
boss.victory_condition: Detonate the Overcharged Plasma Condenser within the central processor casing while avoiding its orbital laser grid.

level.objective: Retrieve the lost quantum research data and escape before the facility self-destructs.
level.reward: Quantum Siphon Schematic and the legendary Starfarer's Crest.

level.setting: An abandoned, derelict corporate research facility floating in deep space, illuminated only by emergency power and flickering starlight.

encounters.hazard: Exposed high-voltage electrical conduits

pickup.name: Overcharged EMP Battery
pickup.effect: Discharges a localized electromagnetic pulse that disables shield matrices

encounters.trigger: A terminal log reveals that the facility's containment core has failed, opening the elevator shafts leading down to the primary lab.

enemy.name: Crazed Synthetic Laborer
enemy.weakness: Overcharged EMP Battery used to short-circuit its neural link

encounters.hazard: Fumes of liquid nitrogen leaking from ruptured coolant tanks

pickup.name: Corrosive Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Dissolves organic and bio-mechanical reinforcement fibers on contact

encounters.trigger: Defeating the synthetic causes its terminal to reboot, unlocking the heavy security doors that seal the experimental observation wing.

enemy.name: Mutated Lab Specimen Beta
enemy.weakness: Corrosive Acid Vial poured into its open chest wounds

encounters.hazard: Unstable chemical pools on the floor

pickup.name: Prototype Grav-Disruptor
pickup.effect: Temporarily suspends gravity in a small area, rendering targets weightless and unstable

encounters.trigger: The creature's death scream triggers an automated lockdown sequence, locking the player inside the main server room with the facility's rogue AI construct.

boss.name: The Architect AI Core
boss.weakness: Prototype Grav-Disruptor which destabilizes its levitating defense shields and exposes its central processors
boss.victory_condition: Destroy the primary mainframe nodes while using shadows to evade the AI's sweep-lasers.

level.objective: Navigate the dark, hazard-filled corridors of the space station to download the classified research data and purge the rogue AI.
level.reward: The Legendary Quantum Cloak module, granting permanent invisibility while remaining stationary.

level.setting: An abandoned orbital biolab orbiting a dying star, dripping with bio-luminescent ooze and cold mist.

encounters.hazard: Ruptured Nitrogen Pipes spraying freezing gas

pickup.name: Phlogistic Igniter Fluid
pickup.effect: Imbues weapon with incendiary transmutations

encounters.trigger: A sudden containment breach alarm unlocks the heavy blast doors to the Vivarium Corridor.

encounters.hazard: Corrosive Acid Pools dripping from the ceiling

pickup.name: Concentrated Nitric Acid
pickup.effect: Allows crafting of highly corrosive metal-dissolving vapors

encounters.trigger: The death screech of the Leech causes a structural collapse, forcing the player through a ventilation shaft to the Cryo-Storage.

encounters.hazard: Slippery Cryo-Ice floors and sub-zero atmospheric exposure

pickup.name: Hyper-Catalyst Serum
pickup.effect: Overcharges chemical reactions, making the next attack explosive

encounters.trigger: The shattered remains of the Golem slide into a pressure-plate elevator, sending the player down into the Core Reactor Chamber.

boss.name: Subject Alpha: The Amalgamated Amorphous
boss.victory_condition: Inject the Hyper-Catalyst Serum into the central core reactor to trigger a thermal reaction that incinerates Subject Alpha.

level.objective: Navigate the derelict biolab, harvest chemical reagents, and neutralize the mutated bio-weapon containment breach.
level.reward: The Chimera Core and the blueprint for the Legendary Philosopher's Railgun.

level.setting: A whimsical, neon-soaked space-jungle greenhouse aboard a malfunctioning colony ship.

encounters.hazard: Slippery nectar pools that invert movement controls.

pickup.name: Sticky Pollen Bomb
pickup.effect: Slows targets and coats them in static electricity.

encounters.trigger: A mechanical vine whips open the gateway to the next biome, the Vapor Springs.

encounters.hazard: Steam geysers that launch the player into the air.

pickup.name: Superheated Plasma Torch
pickup.effect: Melts through solid barriers and inflicts fire damage.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the jelly activates an ancient teleportation pad leading deep into the central hive.

encounters.hazard: Falling globs of electrified honey.

pickup.name: Prismatic Sonic Kazoo
pickup.effect: Emits high-frequency vibrations that disrupt forcefields.

encounters.trigger: The hive-mind hatch door opens wide, revealing the grand greenhouse control room.

boss.name: Giggle-Tron 9000 (The Over-Caffeinated Sprinkler Mech)
boss.victory_condition: Disrupt the mech's main shield using the Prismatic Sonic Kazoo, then disable its central power plug.

level.objective: De-escalate the rogue agricultural AI and restore peaceful, whimsical order to the greenhouse.
level.reward: The Legendary Holographic Cloak of Pixels and a lifetime supply of space-honey.

encounters.hazard: Supersonic pollen drifts that cloud vision and disrupt energy barriers.

pickup.name: Pristine Quartz Shard
pickup.effect: Enhances geo-harmonic vibration frequency.

encounters.trigger: Placing the Pristine Quartz Shard into the base of the First Monolith opens the pathway to the Whispering Ravine.

encounters.hazard: Zero-gravity spatial pockets that suspend movement unpredictably.

pickup.name: Humming Magnetite Core
pickup.effect: Imparts localized gravity manipulation.

encounters.trigger: Using the Humming Magnetite Core to realign the floating debris forms a bridge to the Echoing Sanctuary.

encounters.hazard: Blinding light refractions that reflect attacks back at the attacker.

pickup.name: Astral Resonance Lens
pickup.effect: Amplifies geomantic vibrational beams tenfold.

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Astral Resonance Lens into the main altar summons the sleeping planetary guardian.

boss.name: Aethelgard, the Harmonious World-Singer
boss.victory_condition: Refract the boss's cosmic energy beam back at its core using the Astral Resonance Lens, shattering its protective crystalline shell.

level.objective: Soothe the planet's agitated core by aligning the cosmic monoliths and pacifying the ancient guardian.
level.reward: The Core Harmonic Siphon, a legendary geomantic relic that permits total geological assimilation.

level.setting: An eerie, abandoned cathedral of alchemical heresies, filled with toxic mist and decaying specimens.

encounters.hazard: Sinking pools of quicksilver on the floor.

pickup.name: Calcified Salt Crystals
pickup.effect: Temporarily neutralizes active bio-toxins when crushed.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Homunculus causes the floor to collapse, dropping the player into the catacombs and triggering the awakening of the next abomination.

encounters.hazard: Spores of suffocating black mold floating in the air.

pickup.name: Essence of Phosphor
pickup.effect: Illuminates dark areas and ignites volatile gases upon impact.

encounters.trigger: The death rattle of the Flesh-Pile ignites nearby gas pockets, blowing open the sealed steel vault door ahead.

encounters.hazard: Ruptured pipes spraying burning sulfur across the room.

pickup.name: Amalgamated Silver Elixir
pickup.effect: Converts silver-based constructs back into fragile, liquid metals.

encounters.trigger: The Chimera crashes into the support columns as it dies, opening a secret hatch down into the Grand Sanctum where the Arch-Heretic resides.

boss.name: The Mercury Arch-Heretic
boss.victory_condition: Splash the boss with the Amalgamated Silver Elixir to liquefy its armor, then strike its exposed core with the Vitriolic Acid Catalyst.

level.objective: Navigate the haunted cathedral, survive the mutated abominations, and destroy the Arch-Heretic to purge the corruption.
level.reward: The Philosopher's Stone Fragment and the title of Grandmaster Alchemist.

level.setting: Ominous, ash-choked catacombs beneath a desecrated cathedral

encounters.hazard: Suffocating soot clouds that drain stamina and obscure vision

pickup.name: Vial of Consecrated Oil
pickup.effect: Coats weapons to temporarily add holy fire damage

encounters.trigger: Burning the Husk's remains triggers a collapse, opening the path down to the Crypt of Perpetual Sighs

encounters.hazard: Screaming wall traps that disorient and deal psychic damage

pickup.name: Heart of the Pyre
pickup.effect: A burning ember that doubles player fire damage for one attack

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Cenotaph releases a flood of hot tar, forcing the player to flee into the Molten Ossuary

encounters.hazard: Spits of boiling liquid calcium rising from floor fissures

pickup.name: Singeing Reliquary of the Martyr
pickup.effect: Emits a pulse of pure, searing white-hot light that blinds and melts heavy armor

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Widow opens the heavy iron gate leading to the heart of the Cathedral's underbelly

boss.name: Malakor the Flayed Arch-Inquisitor
boss.victory_condition: Blinding the boss with the Reliquary to expose his exposed ribcage, then incinerating his heart with the Obsidian Firestaff

level.objective: Purge the corrupting influence from the catacombs and reclaim the spark of the First Flame.
level.reward: The Master's Cinder-Brand, granting permanent fire immunity and access to high-tier pyromancy spells.

level.setting: The Whispering Sewers beneath the Asylum

encounters.hazard: Ruptured poison gas pipe

pickup.name: Phosphor Flare
pickup.effect: Illuminates dark areas and burns flammable tissue

encounters.trigger: Turning the rusted wheel unlocks the gate to the Sluice Chamber, where a low growl can be heard.

encounters.hazard: Deep pools of acidic runoff

pickup.name: Vial of Holy Acid
pickup.effect: Corrodes protective seals and skeletal structures

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the old keycard triggers a loud klaxon, opening the heavy metal door to the Vault of the Damned.

encounters.hazard: Swinging spiked meat hooks

pickup.name: Silver-Tipped Bolt
pickup.effect: Shatters cursed relics and pierce absolute darkness

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Abomination releases a pressure valve, blowing open the reinforced vault hatch leading down to the Sanitarium Well.

boss.name: The Blind Executioner
boss.victory_condition: Shoot the hanging bell with the Silver-Tipped Bolt to deafen the boss, then execute a backstab with your Dusksteel Dagger.

level.objective: Navigate the haunted sewers and purge the ancient evil lurking beneath the asylum floors.
level.reward: The Master's Shadow Mask, which grants permanent invisibility in low-light environments.

level.setting: A desolate, abandoned research station buried deep within a frozen, dark tundra.

encounters.hazard: Unstable, collapsing ice stalactites

pickup.name: Phosphor Flare
pickup.effect: Illuminates dark areas and burns away thick necrotic tissues

encounters.trigger: Picking up the Phosphor Flare triggers a power surge, opening the heavy security doors leading to the Cryo-Labs.

encounters.hazard: Leaking liquid nitrogen pipes that instantly freeze skin

pickup.name: Serrated Glass Arrowhead
pickup.effect: Enables arrows to bypass hardened, frozen organic armor

encounters.trigger: Extracting the Serrated Glass Arrowhead sounds a security alarm, sealing the labs and forcing open the escape shaft to the Geothermal Core.

encounters.hazard: Superheated geyser vents blasting scalding steam periodically

pickup.name: Thermite Compound Vial
pickup.effect: Can be attached to arrows to melt through super-hardened sub-zero biological defenses

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Lurker causes its body to collapse onto a pressure plate, revealing the hidden hatch to the Deep Abyss where the anomaly resides.

boss.name: The Frost-Mother Anomaly
boss.victory_condition: Inject the Thermite Compound Vial into the core of the Anomaly using a well-placed bow shot, then shatter its frozen heart.

level.objective: Navigate through the frozen, desolate research station to locate and destroy the central source of the parasitic frost outbreak.
level.reward: The Cryo-Ranger Crest, granting immunity to extreme cold temperatures, and the Frost-Mother's Bow Blueprint.

level.setting: An ancient, subterranean crypt buried deep beneath a ruined cathedral, dimly lit by flickering soul-candles.

encounters.hazard: Crumbling stone sarcophagi that collapse if stepped on.

pickup.name: Vial of Holy Water
pickup.effect: Deals high radiant damage when thrown at unholy creatures.

encounters.trigger: Plucking the Vial of Holy Water from the altar breaks the seals on the catacomb gate, unlocking the path to the Desecrated Vestry.

encounters.hazard: Slick pools of black bile that slow movement speed.

pickup.name: Scythe-Shaped Bone Charm
pickup.effect: Imbues the player's weapon attacks with freezing frost energy.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Spectre causes its dark essence to seep into the floorboards, rotting them away and dropping the player into the Pit of Penance.

encounters.hazard: Scythe traps swinging from the vaulted ceiling.

pickup.name: Amulet of the Grave-Lord
pickup.effect: Summons protective spectral barriers that absorb incoming damage.

encounters.trigger: Acquiring the Amulet of the Grave-Lord triggers a massive tremor, shattering the chamber wall to reveal the hidden Tomb of the Arch-Lich.

boss.name: Arch-Lich Malakor
boss.victory_condition: Defeat Arch-Lich Malakor to reclaim the stolen Crown of Whispers.

level.objective: Navigate the crypt, assemble powerful relics, and banish the Arch-Lich to claim your rightful place as the master of the dead.
level.reward: Unlocks the 'Summon Wraith' spell and the 'Arch-Lich Robes' cosmetic armor set.

level.setting: The Sinking Flesh-Cathedral of the Flayed God

encounters.hazard: Falling bone shrapnel from the collapsing ceiling

pickup.name: Vial of Acidic Bile
pickup.effect: Corrodes protective armor plates

encounters.trigger: Plucking the Vial of Acidic Bile triggers a localized earthquake, splitting the cathedral floor and dropping the player into the Blood-Sodden Crypts.

encounters.hazard: Rising pools of boiling blood that drain health over time

pickup.name: Phosphorescent Wyrm-Sigil
pickup.effect: Emits an intense, blinding flash of cold-fire

encounters.trigger: Applying the Phosphorescent Wyrm-Sigil to the sealed vault door melts the iron locks, opening the pathway to the Altar of Despair.

encounters.hazard: Scything pendulum blades swinging randomly across the narrow altar catwalks

pickup.name: Relic of the Martyr's Heart
pickup.effect: Increases damage by 200% when player health is under 20%

encounters.trigger: Extracting the Relic of the Martyr's Heart triggers a violent structural collapse, forcing the player down a massive flesh-chute straight into the boss arena.

boss.name: The Amalgamated Abomination
boss.victory_condition: Reduce the Amalgamated Abomination's health to 0 while maintaining enough health to survive its final self-destruct blast

level.objective: Survive the brutal, shifting cathedral depths, slay the horrors within, and retrieve the Heart of the Flayed God to halt the chaotic corruption.
level.reward: The 'Frenzy-Born' Berserker subclass unlock, doubling attack speed at low health.

level.setting: An overgrown, silent sanctuary illuminated by eternal starlight, where peace masks a decaying cosmic rot.

encounters.hazard: Thick, choking silver pollen that obscures vision and slows movement.

pickup.name: Vial of Luminescent Sap
pickup.effect: Cures blindness and coats weapon with a sticky, glowing residue.

encounters.trigger: A crystalline bell tolls in the distance, shattering the silence and unlocking the gate to the Moonlit Conservatory.

encounters.hazard: Shattering glass panes that rain down silently when stepped on.

pickup.name: Echoing Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Emits high-frequency vibrations that disrupt kinetic shields and sonic barriers.

encounters.trigger: The roots blocking the grand archway wither away, revealing the path to the Silent Reflecting Pool.

encounters.hazard: Phasing floor tiles that vanish into an endless starry abyss if stood on for too long.

pickup.name: Aegis Star Fragment
pickup.effect: Surrounds the player with a brilliant shield that reflects dark energy back at its source.

encounters.trigger: The surface of the pool solidifies into a glassy staircase leading up to the Cathedral of Whispers.

boss.name: Astraea, the Star-Eaten Warden
boss.victory_condition: Reflect Astraea's cosmic beam back at her core using the Aegis Star Fragment, then shatter her remains with the Purifying Scepter.

level.objective: Purify the defiled sanctuary and put the fallen warden, Astraea, to her eternal, peaceful rest.
level.reward: The 'Celestial Halo' passive ability, which permanently shields the Warden player class from negative mental status effects.

level.setting: The Carousel of Lost Smiles, an abandoned carnival floating in a pastel void.

encounters.hazard: Slick spilled cotton candy syrup that slows movement.

pickup.name: Mirror-Glass Marbles
pickup.effect: Reflects and multiplies bright light sources.

encounters.trigger: Picking up the Mirror-Glass Marbles causes a neon-pink spotlight to shift, illuminating the pathway to the Mirror Maze.

encounters.hazard: Sudden wall-shattering sound waves.

pickup.name: Squeaky Balloon Scepter
pickup.effect: Emits a high-pitched, disruptive frequency when squeezed.

encounters.trigger: Squeezing the Squeaky Balloon Scepter shatters the final mirror wall, revealing the path to the Funhouse.

encounters.hazard: Swinging oversized polka-dot pendulum axes.

pickup.name: Bag of Sour Stardust Candy
pickup.effect: Causes puckering, physical distortions, and breaks illusion-based magic.

encounters.trigger: Throwing the Bag of Sour Stardust Candy down the slide dissolves the shadowy barrier blocking the Big Top entrance.

boss.name: The Ringmaster of Regret
boss.victory_condition: Feed the Bag of Sour Stardust Candy to the Ringmaster to collapse his physical illusion, then hit him with the Glittering Prismatic Wand.

level.objective: Traverse the nightmare carnival and break the whimsical illusion trapping the lost children's laughter.
level.reward: The Carnival's Heart, transforming the illusionist's wand into the Cosmic Dreamweaver staff.
